claim_boundary: Differentiable state-of-art scorecard governance only; the lane remains SOTA-candidate until category rows have promoted claim-ledger evidence, isolated benchmark artefacts, and external baseline comparisons.

rows.baseline: JAX composable transforms: grad/value_and_grad, jacfwd/jacrev, Hessian, JVP/VJP, jit, vmap, pmap/sharding, PyTrees, AOT/export, and OpenXLA devices.
blockers: provider/native arbitrary simulator lowering remains open
finite-shot, dynamic-circuit, provider, hardware, and isolated benchmark rows remain blocked
rows.claim_boundary: Differentiable state-of-art scorecard governance only; the lane remains SOTA-candidate until category rows have promoted claim-ledger evidence, isolated benchmark artefacts, and external baseline comparisons.
rows.current_evidence: Registered deterministic local Phase-QNode JAX flat, PyTree, jit, vmap, pmap/sharding, and Hessian routes exist without host callbacks for bounded statevector circuits.

rows.baseline: PyTorch eager autograd, nn.Module, torch.func, torch.compile, AOTAutograd, dynamic shapes, CPU/GPU device maturity, and production training ergonomics.
blockers: compatible CUDA/device evidence is scheduled for cloud hardware
fullgraph compile, finite-shot, provider, hardware, and isolated benchmark rows remain blocked
rows.claim_boundary: Differentiable state-of-art scorecard governance only; the lane remains SOTA-candidate until category rows have promoted claim-ledger evidence, isolated benchmark artefacts, and external baseline comparisons.
rows.current_evidence: Bounded PyTorch nn.Module, torch.func, non-fullgraph torch.compile, and local Phase-QNode statevector routes exist with fail-closed fullgraph/CUDA/provider gaps.

rows.baseline: PennyLane QNode interfaces, diff-method routing, simulator adjoint/backprop, finite-shot methods, device gradients, provider plugins, and hardware-compatible routes.
blockers: real provider-plugin execution artefacts are missing
hardware-plugin and provider-gradient parity artefacts are missing
rows.claim_boundary: Differentiable state-of-art scorecard governance only; the lane remains SOTA-candidate until category rows have promoted claim-ledger evidence, isolated benchmark artefacts, and external baseline comparisons.
rows.current_evidence: Bounded identical-circuit export/import and local default-qubit parity exist; provider-plugin execution, provider gradients, hardware plugins, and isolated benchmark evidence remain open.

rows.baseline: Qiskit Estimator/Sampler primitives, IBM Runtime sessions, backend/transpilation metadata, raw counts, calibration snapshots, and gradient workflows.
blockers: live-ticket-approved Runtime Estimator/Sampler execution is missing

rows.claim_boundary: Differentiable state-of-art scorecard governance only; the lane remains SOTA-candidate until category rows have promoted claim-ledger evidence, isolated benchmark artefacts, and external baseline comparisons.
rows.current_evidence: No-submit Runtime/QPU evidence schemas and local Statevector parity exist; live Runtime/QPU execution, raw-count replay attachments, calibration comparison, and isolated evidence remain open.

rows.baseline: Catalyst-style MLIR/LLVM/QIR compiled quantum-classical workflows, qjit, compiled control flow, compiled differentiation, and device support.
blockers: dedicated Catalyst comparison coverage is missing
compiled workflow, finite-shot, and device-support parity are unscored
rows.claim_boundary: Differentiable state-of-art scorecard governance only; the lane remains SOTA-candidate until category rows have promoted claim-ledger evidence, isolated benchmark artefacts, and external baseline comparisons.
rows.current_evidence: SCPN has MLIR interchange and bounded compiler-AD metadata, but no dedicated Catalyst comparison row or compiled quantum-classical workflow parity artefact.

rows.current_evidence: Bounded native LLVM Enzyme scalar execution and MLIR maturity artefacts exist; raw breadth artifacts, derived full breadth evidence, and isolated benchmark IDs remain open.

rows.baseline: Production performance claims require isolated affinity, host-load context, governor/frequency metadata, raw timing rows, memory rows, dependency versions, and reproducible artifacts.
blockers: isolated benchmark raw artifacts are missing

rows.baseline: Users need stable APIs, strict typing, full public docstrings, docs, generated manifests, module-specific tests, claim-ledger alignment, and public-language guards.
blockers: repository-wide strict mypy/docstring debt remains outside this slice

rows.claim_boundary: Differentiable state-of-art scorecard governance only; the lane remains SOTA-candidate until category rows have promoted claim-ledger evidence, isolated benchmark artefacts, and external baseline comparisons.
rows.current_evidence: Claim ledger, module-hardening audit, hardening-slice gate, generated manifest, and docs exist; the new scorecard keeps SOTA wording bounded until rows are promoted.

rows.baseline: A reusable differentiable computing stack needs clear licensing, install routes, contributor onboarding, permissive-core decision if needed, and hidden-state-free examples.
blockers: permissive scpn-quantum-core split is undecided
maintainer onboarding issues should wait until route classification stabilizes
